summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Basic Shi e-commerce app. Backend APIs, frontend UI, authentication flow, cart functionality, and protected routes all working correctly.
passed_tests: Landing page loads with hero section, featured products, and category chips
Shop page displays 16 products with working category filters
Product detail page shows correct info with quantity controls
Add to cart prompts login for unauthenticated users
Google OAuth authentication redirects correctly (Emergent Auth)
Authenticated users can access cart and dashboard
Cart operations work: add items, update quantities
Protected routes properly redirect unauthenticated users
Navigation updates correctly based on auth state
Dark mode Apple-style design consistently applied
Space Grotesk font correctly used for headings
Category navigation from landing page works
